response:
I want 10 weaknesses of Dell from 2023 and I want the 10 points to be similar to this:  
1. [Company name] experienced a decline in revenue or profitability during the specified period.  
2. [Company name] saw a decrease in earnings per share (EPS) during the specified period.  
3. [Company name] experienced a drop in stock price during the specified period.  
4. [Company name] is heavily reliant on a single product or service.  
5. [Company name] experienced an increase in liabilities during the specified period.  
6. [Company name] faced challenges in production or supply due to external factors.  
7. [Company name] has no offerings in a particular area or product line.  
8. [Company name] has limited or no access to certain resources or facilities.  
9. [Company name] has a high concentration of sales from a few large customers.  
10. [Company name] is facing legal or regulatory challenges during the specified period.
